tagline: Crafting the future of web experiences through AI-driven automation and modern web development.
description: Software Engineer with specialized focus on AI-driven automation and modern web development. I leverage advanced AI tools and workflows to design and build high-performance, visually immersive digital experiences.

roles.detailed: Full-Stack Developer | AI Automation Specialist | 3D Web Animation Expert

bio: Software Engineer specializing in AI-driven automation and modern web development. I combine technical precision with creative execution to deliver solutions that are functionally robust and aesthetically compelling. With expertise in React, Node.js, Three.js, and AI automation, I design cutting-edge websites including fully interactive 3D animated platforms, product-focused websites optimized for engagement and conversion, and sleek professional portfolio sites. By integrating AI into the development pipeline, I ensure efficiency, scalability, and innovation in every project.

bullets: Designed and developed 2 production-grade websites with a focus on visual quality, responsiveness, and conversion-optimized UX for real-world clients.
Built and deployed a fully offline RAG-based AI model enabling intelligent, context-aware document querying without relying on cloud APIs.
Integrated AI-driven automation workflows into the development pipeline, significantly reducing iteration time and enabling scalable delivery of complex web projects.
experience.desc: Independent software engineer developing high-performance web experiences with AI integration and advanced animations.

publications.desc: Completing a rigorous four-year program covering algorithms, software architecture, AI/ML, web systems, and project-based engineering. NUST is Pakistan's premier engineering institution consistently ranked among Asia's top universities.

publications.desc: Completed higher secondary education with a strong foundation in Mathematics, Physics, and analytical problem-solving. This phase sharpened logical thinking, technical discipline, and ability to approach complex concepts with clarity.

publications.desc: Built core academic strength through science-focused coursework and consistent performance. Developed early confidence in structured learning, practical reasoning, and disciplined study habits.

publications.title: Philosophy
publications.desc: "Wanna learn Things Faster, Break them Fast" - A philosophy centered on rapid experimentation, learning through doing, and embracing productive failure as a path to innovation.
